title: Take shelter from 20
wikitext:
[]: Take shelter from 2.0! [NO SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Fri Jun 26, 2009 4:32 am So I've seen posts of other people planning on hiding under a rock when 2.0 hits Japan to avoid spoilers and the like and I figured we should make each other known and such~ I for one will be abstaining from viewing 2.0 until I have a DVD quality format and (probably) subtitles. WHY: I refuse to despoil the quality of the experience! I waited for 1.0 and it was absolutely worth it. How will I resist the temptation? An iron will gained through years of Canadian training. Declare yourselves!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 26, 2009 5:28 am Shifted to the Rebuild subforum.

[]: Re: Take shelter from 2.0!             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:38 am Orphan Of Darkness wrote: I refuse to despoil the quality of the experience!

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:48 am While it's interesting to read spoilers the best experience would probably come from waiting, and waiting, and waiting for a subbed version or the dvd to come out. But it's going to be difficult to resist coming here. I am not strong...

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:49 am That sounds like a good idea. Last time, the only things that could "ruin" the movie for us were the 3 camshots of Sachiel, Ramiel, and the preview of the next movie, and even then, they didn't really spoil anything. This time, I'm guessing even the slightest mention of Rebuild 2.0 would illicit remarks something along the lines of "Oh, I was so surprised when...", or "Wasn't the part when ... so amazing?". I'm also guessing there'll be tons of summaries and reviews... I wonder if they'll do something like the Korean film festival again, and show it in multi-lingual subtitles... If they did, I think I'd have to go see it then lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:42 am I will be in Wexford for two weeks from tomorrow. There will be no internet access. There will be lots of drink. There will be lots of rain. Guess what I'm going to spend the next two weeks of my life doing?

[]: Re: Take shelter from 2.0!             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:44 am Last time, people didn't know there was next to nothing to spoil. This time, there's likely tons to spoil. Not knowing anything is as bad as knowing when one doesn't want to know. But if one knows that one doesn't want to know, it means that one knows. Okay, if you can't get your heads around that- either you're spoiled, or you're not. The Eva Monkey wrote: We should probably segment the forum somehow so people don't spoil it for anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Fri Jun 26, 2009 9:09 am There is no way that I will torture myself for a few months by avoiding spoilers, just so that I can get a completely fresh view of 2.0. In any case, it's already too late for that since I've already seen Mari, the new Evas, and parts of the new angels. Not to mention the fact that 60 minutes of the movie will be re-animation, with at most 40 minutes that could be spoiled. So, yeah, I'll be here tonight, waiting for the first spoilers to roll in. And I know that I'll still enjoy 2.0 when I see it in full.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 26, 2009 9:34 am Gotta agree. The amount of time I've spent waiting and reading stuff on this site about this movie I'm not gonna go into seclusion for 5-9 months and wait for the DVD. I mean sure there are going to be some drastic changes but the huge Eva fan that I am I can probably predict how the whole story is going to play out. So yeah, I'll be here anticipating and over analyzing every little morsel of info that leaks out. Hell, eve without seeing 2.0 when the details on the 3.0 teaser leaks I'll start thinking and fanwanking "What does that 0.6 second shot mean?"

[]:             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:21 am If someone films it in the theaters with decent quality, I'll watch it. There's no way I'm going to wait for the DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:44 am I'm too curious....i would watch even a shitty raw...like for 1.0....moreover, i remember it was in 11 parts on Youtube....

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:45 am It was easy to avoid spoilers for 1.0, because first of all there wasn't much about it that hadn't already been spoiled by the show, and secondly at that time, Evangelion was not on my mind. However, this time it's going to be a bit tougher, and with the amount of speculation / fanwankery I've already put into watching the trailers, I'm probably going to end up watching a subbed bootleg as soon as one is availible, even if it's crappy quality. I'll have plenty of chances to see the pretty version when it's out on DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:58 am I'm more interested in the story than in flashy visuals, so let the spoilers come!

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Jun 26, 2009 11:02 am I will devour every spoiled detail of the film like a starved wolf. I have no willpower or self control whatsoever.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jun 26, 2009 11:04 am not if i get to them first

[]:             Quote Post by zarwin » Fri Jun 26, 2009 11:10 am JimmyWolk wrote: I'm more interested in the story than in flashy visuals, so let the spoilers come!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2009 11:15 am 2.0 spoilers from teh Ornette, I'm fine with. But with 4.0 and maybe 3.0 (if it's two seperate films) I'll avoid this subforum like the plague.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 26, 2009 11:37 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: 2.0 spoilers from teh Ornette, I'm fine with. But with 4.0 and maybe 3.0 (if it's two seperate films) I'll avoid this subforum like the plague.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Fri Jun 26, 2009 3:39 pm I think I'll revise what I said earlier. It would be impossible to avoid all spoilers, so I guess I'll just take the ones that don't ruin the entire storyline for me (e.g. partial battle scenes, reanimated stuff, etc.). For some reason, even when I made my first post, I just knew had to watch the 3.0 trailer at the end... I'd agree with SSD and Tim... At this point, the plot isn't nearly divergent enough to really be worrying about spoilers, but since this will take us up to Zeruel and there are 2 movies left, there has to be something absolutely MASSIVE in the works (almost as big as Long Clock Angel in the fanart thread)... The only "spoilers" of 3.0 and 4.0 I'll take are their trailers.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:00 pm Spoiler for 2.0 Aries Dies.
